title: All The Fabric
description: All The Fabric is a streamlined version of our modpack, All The Forge, optimized for performance while retaining essential mods.
body:
[![BisectHosting use code AMPZ for 25% off](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/All_the_Fabric/BH_ATF_promo.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/AMPZ?r=modrinth_ATFB5)

Want to show your support for me and the development of All The Fabric? Check out BisectHosting and use the AMPZ for a 25% discount on your first month of a gaming server as a new customer. With their 24/7 support and quick response times, you can count on excellent assistance for all your gaming requirements. To get started click the banner above or visiting this [link](https://bisecthosting.com/AMPZ?r=modrinth_ATF5)

![All The Fabric](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/All_the_Fabric/BH_ATF_header.webp)

![Minecraft Java Edition](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft%20Java%20Edition-1.20.1-limegreen?style=for-the-badge&logo=block)
![Minimum RAM](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minimum%20RAM-4GB-limegreen?style=for-the-badge&logo=)
![Server Pack](https://img.shields.io/badge/Server%20Pack-YES-limegreen?style=for-the-badge&logo=)
[![FORGE Edition](https://img.shields.io/badge/FORGE-EDITION-limegreen?style=for-the-badge&logo=)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/all-the-forge)

#### NO OPTIFINE NEEDED: Access Shaders in Video Settings > Shader Packs > Add Your Shader

![Overview](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/All_the_Fabric/BH_ATF_overview.webp)

All The Fabric is designed for optimal performance, utilizing the Fabric Loader API. It seamlessly incorporates selected mods from our [All The Forge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/all-the-forge) modpack, making it an excellent choice for Minecraft enthusiasts with low-end PC setups that might struggle to handle our comprehensive Forge pack. Immerse yourself in a world of possibilities with popular mods like Bewitchment and Applied Energistics 2, enhancing your gaming experience. All The Fabric prioritizes stability and an immersive Minecraft journey, making it the ultimate selection.

Our modpack offers a diverse range of style mods to cater to your unique preferences. Whether you enjoy mixing gameplay styles or need a lighter alternative to our Forge modpack, you've come to the right place. Engineered with performance in mind, this modpack ensures a smooth experience on lower-end PCs with at least 4GB of RAM. However, we strongly recommend avoiding installation on machines with less than 4GB of RAM, as it hasn't been tested and may result in performance issues.

![Features](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/All_the_Fabric/BH_ATF_features.webp)

- Explore diverse biomes with mods like [Terrestria](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomesyougo) and [Traverse](https://modrinth.com/mod/traverse).
  
- Experience unique landscapes in [Cinderscapes](https://modrinth.com/mod/cinderscapes) and reach for the stars with [Ad Astra](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra).
  
- Dive into advanced technology with [Applied Energistics 2](https://modrinth.com/mod/ae2) and [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric).
  
- Uncover the secrets of the Industrial Revolution using [Industrial Revolution](https://modrinth.com/mod/industrial-revolution) and [Tech Reborn](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/techreborn).
  
- Embrace the mystical world of [Bewitchment](https://modrinth.com/mod/bewitchment) and enhance gameplay with [CC: Tweaked](https://modrinth.com/mod/cc-tweaked).
  
- Build stunning structures with [Chisel Reborn](https://modrinth.com/mod/chisel-reborn) and [Macaw’s Bridges](https://modrinth.com/mod/macaws-bridges).
- Enjoy abundant building blocks and delicious food from [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight).
- Customize your experience with built-in Shader support via [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) (requires adding your own Shader).
- Roll back chat reporting to Pre 1.19 and benefit from quality-of-life improvements like Backpacks, Waystones, recipe fixes/upgrades, optimizations, and handheld device support.

- All this and more in a feature-packed modpack with over 100 mods!

You can find the full list of mods under the "Versions" tab by following this [link](https://modrinth.com/modpack/atfb/versions).

![Support](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/All_the_Fabric/BH_ATF_support.webp)

If you need help or support with this modpack, please join our Discord server by clicking the Discord banner below.

[![Support](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/All_the_Fabric/BH_ATF_discord.webp)](https://discord.ampznetwork.com)

**FABRIC:** While the latest version of Fabric for 1.20.1 should be compatible, it's possible that it may cause an older mod in the modpack to break. In such a case, the version of Fabric currently included in the modpack is 0.16.14

**OptiFine:** By default, OptiFine is not compatible with All The Fabric because it contains some pre-installed optimization mods. Therefore, you must remove the listed mods below in order to load the pack with OptiFine.

<details>
<summary>Optimization Mods</summary>

|||
| ------------- | ------------- |
| [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)  ||
| [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) | |
| [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium) | |
| [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) | |
| [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast) | |
| [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) | |
| [Cull Less Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/cull-less-leaves) | |
| [Custom Entity Models](https://modrinth.com/mod/cem) | |
| [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) | |
| [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling) | |
| [OptiGUI](https://modrinth.com/mod/optigui)  ||

</details>

Please remember that in addition to OptiFine, you must also have a mod called OptiFabric installed, otherwise the pack will crash. We do not recommend using OptiFine at all due to its closed source and mod incompatibility. You can download OptiFabric from [this link](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/optifabric) if you still want to use OptiFine.


## OPTIONAL RECOMMENDATIONS: ##

If your system can handle it, I recommend trying out shaders with this modpack and Minecraft to enhance your experience. Shaders can significantly improve both the modpack and the game. For the best results, consider using either [Complementary Shaders - Unbound](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-unbound) or [Complementary Shaders - Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined).
